conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: Use a professional yet warm tone tailored for an academic audience, avoiding technical jargon.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks."
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. Use a professional yet warm tone tailored for an academic audience, avoiding technical jargon. The email must include the phrase "The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks."
response:
Subject: Thank You - [Your Name] - Internship Program Reflection

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

Please accept this email as a sincere expression of my gratitude for the opportunity to participate in the internship program under your guidance this past [Semester/Summer/Time Period].

My time working with you and the team at [Department/Lab Name] has been an incredibly valuable and rewarding experience. I deeply appreciate the time and mentorship you dedicated to me throughout this program. Your willingness to share your expertise and provide insightful feedback has been instrumental in my professional and academic growth.

I particularly valued the chance to apply theoretical knowledge to real-world challenges. To be candid, **The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks.** Beyond the technical skills, I also gained a much deeper appreciation for the rigorous process of academic research and problem-solving within a professional setting.

The environment you fostered was one of intellectual curiosity and support, which made this experience truly exceptional. I feel much better prepared for the next steps in my academic and career journey because of your guidance.

Thank you once again for this wonderful opportunity. I hope to stay in touch and wish you and the department all the best in your future research.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID or Current Program]
[Your Email Address]<turn|>
